description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the zenhaskell/analysis:lts-12.9 Docker image, define variables GITECT_HOST, PROJECT_PATH, TARGET_BRANCH, and two stages: validate and policy. In the validate stage add a diagrams job that runs `dihaa safety/vehicle-control-diagram.md -p`, then `mkdir public`, then `cp */*.png public/`, and publishes the public directory as an artifact. Also in the validate stage add a lint job that installs the markdown linter with `gem install mdl -v 0.4.0` and runs `mdl -s <(echo "rule 'MD009', :br_spaces => 4") .`. In the policy stage add a policy job that runs only when the variable $PROJECT_PATH equals $CI_PROJECT_PATH, excludes the master branch and tags, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, executes a curl command `output=$(curl -k -H "Accept: application/json" -H "X-Gitect-Token: ${GITECT_HOST_TOKEN}" -G --data-urlencode "target-branch=${TARGET_BRANCH}" "${GITECT_HOST}/api/v1/gitlab.com/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}/~/${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}/${CI_COMMIT_SHA}/policy-compliance")`, echoes the output, and contains a bash conditional that exits with error if compliance fails.
